queue_item.action: Capture Event Timing and Long Animation Frames within one explicit browser interaction window without inventing support or silently dropping zero-interactionId observations.

progress.finding: Browser collection must retain Event Timing and Long Animation Frames as independent streams inside one named observation window. Unsupported APIs and Event Timing entries with interactionId 0 are evidence states, not values that may be silently discarded or converted into acceptance.
progress.verification: 5 isolated Node unit tests passed with byte-identical adapter and test files plus evaluator interface doubles; exact repository evaluator integration and real-browser execution remain unverified.

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should call start() immediately before one exact deployed gesture and close() after the bounded observation window, retain the raw entries and both verdicts, and pass them to the R-007 deployment-bound packet builder. A successful packet still does not establish audibility or subjective smoothness.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Append-only team-owned update; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
next_action: Add an integration test that executes the adapter against the exact R-005 and R-006 evaluators, then wire a target-browser harness that records deployment identity, device/browser identity, and repeated observation-window results.
